CustomField.description: Retention policy: how many completed scan runs to keep. When exceeded, the oldest run and all its findings are automatically deleted. Default: 5 (appropriate for developer sandboxes with 200MB storage limits).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Maximum number of completed scan runs to retain. When exceeded, the oldest run and all its findings are automatically deleted. Default: 5 (sandbox). Increase for production compliance requirements.
CustomField.label: Max Scan Runs
